_UsersMigration: M4.6: plaintext 'password' fields removed. Supply credentials via either SEED_PASSWORD_{CODE} env var (e.g. SEED_PASSWORD_AD_0001) OR by populating 'passwordCipher' with a DPAPI ciphertext produced by SiemensS7Demo.App.Auth.DpapiProtectedStore.Protect(...). The Users[].password field is still honoured if present (for the headless smoke harness only); production configs MUST leave it empty.
_MqttMigration: M4.6: 'password' field cleared. Supply broker password via MQTT_PASSWORD env var OR by populating 'passwordCipher' with DPAPI ciphertext. UseTls defaults to false; flip to true for production brokers.
